use_cases.description: Write SEO blog post with structured format and meta description
use_cases.expected_behavior: Generates blog post with H2 headings, meta description, tool mentions, no slop phrases

use_cases.description: Create engaging LinkedIn post with personal perspective
use_cases.expected_behavior: Generates LinkedIn post with hook, personal voice, engagement question, no AI cliches

use_cases.description: Write monthly newsletter with subject, preview, and actionable tips
use_cases.expected_behavior: Generates newsletter with subject line, preview text, 3 tips, P.S. section

use_cases.description: Create sales email sequence for services
use_cases.expected_behavior: Generates 5-email sequence with funnel progression, subject lines, proper length

use_cases.description: Generate YouTube video script with timestamps and visual cues
use_cases.expected_behavior: Generates script with timestamp markers, visual cues, intro hook, CTA

use_cases.description: Create monthly content calendar with cascade repurposing
use_cases.expected_behavior: Generates calendar with blogs, LinkedIn posts, newsletters following cascade model

use_cases.description: Audit text for AI-generated patterns and provide rewrite
use_cases.expected_behavior: Identifies slop phrases, provides rewritten alternative

use_cases.description: Write Twitter thread with hooks and CTAs
use_cases.expected_behavior: Generates 8 tweets under 280 characters each with hook and CTA

use_cases.description: Generate landing page copy with features and CTA
use_cases.expected_behavior: Generates headline, subheadline, 3 features, and CTA button text

use_cases.description: Create Voice DNA profile from writing sample
use_cases.expected_behavior: Extracts tone, style attributes, and value proposition from sample
